Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x05E5 "PROWLER-CF00-05E5" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $cf00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Prowler.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $CF00 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings 2. Sets $DA to $00 and $DB to $02 to avoid text display errors in the options menu
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
